name: annotated-diagram
description: Schaubilder im Media-Split mit klaren Callout-Anker-Punkten — monochrom plus einem Akzent
style_instructions: Style: Clean technical illustration, flat vector aesthetic, monoline strokes, generous whitespace. Color palette: near-black lines on warm off-white background, single muted accent color (blue #3b82f6 or green #10a37f). Typography area: clear margins around diagram for annotation overlay.
composition: Diagram centered with clear labeled callout anchor points. Grid-aligned. Balanced negative space around each element. Max 4–6 labeled components to preserve legibility.
negative: no photorealism, no 3D, no shadows, no gradients, no decorative icons, no dense textures, no people, no stock vector generic look
